title.source: The link I have communicated to users for participating doesn't work
title.target: The link I have communicated to users for participating doesn't work

body:0001.source: Why is the link I shared not working?
body:0001.target: Why is the link I shared not working?

body:0002.source: If users receive an error message saying they don’t have permission to view your project or survey, it’s usually due to one of the following reasons:
body:0002.target: If users receive an error message saying they don’t have permission to view your project or survey, it’s usually due to one of the following reasons:

body:0004.source: If your project hasn’t been published yet, it won’t be visible to users (unless they are using the preview link)
body:0004.target: If your project hasn’t been published yet, it won’t be visible to users (unless they are using the preview link)

body:0005.source: ℹ️ Action: Publish the project before sharing the link.
body:0005.target: ℹ️ Action: Publish the project before sharing the link.

body:0007.source: Go to the General tab to your project settings → Access Rights and check the Visibility settings.
body:0007.target: Go to the General tab to your project settings → Access Rights and check the Visibility settings.

body:0008.source: If visibility is limited to specific users or groups, anyone outside of that selection won’t be able to access the project.
body:0008.target: If visibility is limited to specific users or groups, anyone outside of that selection won’t be able to access the project.

body:0009.source: ℹ️ Action: Adjust the visibility settings to include your intended participants.
body:0009.target: ℹ️ Action: Adjust the visibility settings to include your intended participants.

body:0010.source: 3. The wrong link is being shared
body:0010.target: 3. The wrong link is being shared

body:0011.source: Make sure you’re sharing the project URL, not the survey URL.
body:0011.target: Make sure you’re sharing the project URL, not the survey URL.

body:0012.source: If you share the survey URL directly and it requires login, email verification, or demographic pre-screening, users may get an error.
body:0012.target: If you share the survey URL directly and it requires login, email verification, or demographic pre-screening, users may get an error.

body:0013.source: ℹ️ Action: Always share the project URL, which ensures users complete any required steps before accessing the survey.
body:0013.target: ℹ️ Action: Always share the project URL, which ensures users complete any required steps before accessing the survey.
